fields.Name: IT01 - Server RunView Cache Integrity
fields.Description: Ports server-cache-tests.ts S1-S26 against a live SQLServerDataProvider with an InstrumentedLocalStorageProvider. The 23 deterministic checks always run; the 3 mutation checks (S17/S23/S24) run only when the selector sets runMutationTests.

ExpectedOutcomes.summary: All cache hit/miss/shape assertions pass; counters scoped to RunViewCache. Ordering inside the bundle is load-bearing (S1->S2->S3 share the 's1' slot).
